_comment: Asset generation manifest. Keep these groups aligned with src/config.js, src/heroes.js, and checked-in assets. scripts/gen-art.ps1 reads groups and writes PNG files under outputDir/group/id.png.
styleSuffix: Game asset, top-down or three-quarter view icon, vibrant colors, clean silhouette, centered single subject, transparent background, no text, fantasy tower-defense art style, square composition.

towers.prompt: an archer tower with a crossbow, stone base, fantasy
a cannon tower with a heavy iron barrel, splash damage
an ice crystal tower glowing blue, frost magic
a tesla coil lightning tower crackling with electricity
a poison mist tower with green alchemical glass and toxic vapor
a holy support tower with golden banners and a radiant blessing aura
a crimson spirit beacon tower with lantern flame and revealing light
a long-range sniper tower with a precise ballista and watch platform
an arcane obelisk tower with violet runes and weakening magic
a heavy mortar tower with a short bronze cannon and explosive shells

enemies.prompt: a small green slime monster, cute but menacing
a fast running goblin with a dagger
a heavily armored orc brute, tanky
a dark flying bat monster with sharp wings
a giant demon boss monster, glowing red eyes, intimidating
a blue-white frost wolf with icy fur and sharp claws
a small fire imp demon with ember horns and mischievous grin
a shield-bearing armored soldier monster with a heavy iron shield
a green-robed enemy medic carrying healing charms and vials
an icy wraith spirit with spectral armor and a regenerating shield
a lava golem with molten cracks, stone fists, and a heat shield
a fiery ember bat with glowing orange wings
a thunder ronin enemy with a straw hat and lightning blade
a fast abyss hound with purple lightning markings
a masked silencer mage enemy with mute sigils and violet robes
a mirror spirit enemy with reflective glass armor
a golden armored warden enemy projecting a protective aura
a thunder yaksha boss with violet horns and a massive weapon

heroes.prompt: a chibi paladin knight in blue and silver armor, blonde hair, holding a silver sword
a chibi elf ranger in green leather armor, holding a wooden bow, brown hair
a chibi fire mage in red and orange robes, holding a glowing fire staff, white beard
a chibi ice mage in blue and white robes, holding a frost staff, silver hair
a chibi valkyrie warrior in golden winged armor, holding a lightning spear, white hair
a chibi cleric priest in white and gold robes, holding a holy staff, gentle face
a chibi fox spirit heroine in elegant red robes, fire magic, nine-tail motif
a chibi legendary warrior with a long beard, green armor, and crescent blade
a chibi monkey king hero with golden staff, thunder aura, and agile stance
a chibi flame wheel hero with red ribbons, spear, and youthful expression
a chibi thunder wing hero with storm feathers and electric talons
a chibi bull demon king hero with horned armor and a heavy axe
a chibi white serpent heroine in pale blue robes casting ice magic
a chibi three-eyed celestial warrior with spear and thunder halo
a chibi demon-quelling judge hero with talismans and dark robes

maps.prompt: a top-down tower defense grassland map tile set with winding plains road, grass, bushes, trees, and rocks
a top-down tower defense canyon map tile set with narrow cliffs, winding canyon road, dry rocks, and sparse shrubs
a top-down tower defense lava canyon map tile set with volcanic ground, molten cracks, black rock, and winding path

skills.prompt: a flaming meteor falling from the sky, fire impact
an icy freeze nova spreading frost, blue
a holy judgment sigil striking enemies with radiant light
a magical seal array binding enemies with runes

core.prompt: a beautiful guardian goddess in white and gold robes, radiant holy halo, serene protective pose, divine light

tiles.prompt: a seamless top-down grass terrain tile, fantasy tower defense
a seamless top-down darker grass terrain tile, fantasy tower defense
a seamless top-down mossy grass terrain tile, fantasy tower defense
a seamless top-down dirt path tile for a fantasy tower defense map
a top-down decorative rock prop for a fantasy tower defense map
a top-down decorative bush prop for a fantasy tower defense map
a top-down decorative tree prop for a fantasy tower defense map
